name: Back 9 Lounge
address: 1411 Chy Way Suite A, Billings, MT 59106
about: Back 9 Lounge is an indoor golf and multi-sport venue in Billings, MT, featuring 5 private suites and one VIP room with various simulator setups. The facility offers a full bar and a full kitchen menu provided by The Den, alongside a casual and social atmosphere. Pricing is based on reservation time rather than the number of people, with a general guideline of one hour per person for 18 holes of golf. It is a suitable destination for both individual practice and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers over 90 golf courses with new courses added monthly
Features premium TruGolf simulators for a realistic golf experience
Provides a full bar and kitchen menu for a complete social experience
Includes 5 private suites and a VIP room for groups

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen menu with items like bratwurst, burgers, and pizzas. All food provided by The Den.

simulator_hardware.model: E6 Connect / Rally Baseball / Slap Shot Hockey / Foot Golf / Breakaway Soccer
simulator_hardware.notes: Features TruGolf simulators and additional multi-sport simulators in the VIP room including Rally Baseball, Slap Shot Hockey, Foot Golf, and Breakaway Soccer.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether they provide club rentals. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, all food and alcohol must be purchased on-site. The Back 9 Lounge offers a full bar and kitchen menu provided by The Den.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a general rule, it takes one hour per person to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Back 9 Lounge kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers activities like mini-golf games and Foot Golf.
